demo.title: kupo-perps.sh
demo.code:
# Markets — crypto, US stocks, indices, FX, commodities (up to 50x)
curl https://api.kupo.gg/v1/perps/markets \
  -H "Authorization: Bearer $KUPO_API_KEY"

# Long NVDA 5x with $200
curl -X POST https://api.kupo.gg/v1/perps/order \
  -H "Authorization: Bearer $KUPO_API_KEY" -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d '{"coin":"xyz:NVDA","side":"buy","type":"market","sizeUsd":200,"leverage":5}'

# Positions + PnL
curl https://api.kupo.gg/v1/perps/account \
  -H "Authorization: Bearer $KUPO_API_KEY"

# Set TP/SL on a live position
curl -X POST https://api.kupo.gg/v1/perps/tpsl \
  -H "Authorization: Bearer $KUPO_API_KEY" -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d '{"coin":"xyz:NVDA","tpPx":220.5,"slPx":180}'

setup: Sign in with Telegram at kupo.gg — creates your Kupo account (perps account is created on first use)
Create an API key with the `trade` scope at kupo.gg/developer
Deposit into perps on kupo.gg (Portfolio → Perpetuals) — the API trades the funded balance, it can never move funds out
